mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cash_transactions (wallet_id, type, amount, balance_after, pg_transaction_id, status, reference_id) VALUES (#{walletId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{pgTransactionId}, #{status}, #{referenceId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, wallet_id, type, amount, balance_after, pg_transaction_id, status, reference_id, created_at FROM cash_transactions WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
